Class FishingContributor

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.sidebar.FishingContributor
All Implemented Interfaces:
SidebarContributor
public class FishingContributor extends Object implements SidebarContributor
Contributes fishing session information to the player sidebar.

Lines are only shown while the player's hook is bobbing in water, and include biome, weather, elapsed cast time, and any active bait zones at the hook's location.

      public FishingContributor(BaitZoneService baitZoneService)

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Description copied from interface: SidebarContributor
      Returns the unique identifier for this contributor. Used for registration and removal.
      Specified by:
      getId in interface SidebarContributor
      Returns:
      the contributor ID, e.g. "sylphian-fishing-bait"

    • getPriority

      public int getPriority()
      Description copied from interface: SidebarContributor
      Returns the priority that controls this contributor's vertical position relative to others. Lower values appear higher.
      Specified by:
      getPriority in interface SidebarContributor
      Returns:
      the priority value

    • getLinesFor

      public List<SidebarLine> getLinesFor(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Returns bait zone lines if the player's hook is bobbing in one or more zones. Returns an empty list otherwise, hiding the section.
      Specified by:
      getLinesFor in interface SidebarContributor
      Parameters:
      player - the player to get lines for
      Returns:
      sidebar lines showing active bait zones, or empty

    • trackHook

      public void trackHook(UUID uuid, org.bukkit.entity.FishHook hook)
      Registers the player's active fishing hook for zone tracking.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      hook - the active fishing hook

    • clearHook

      public void clearHook(UUID uuid)
      Removes the player's hook from tracking.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
